mediapackage.packaginggroup.logconfigura: Sets a custom Amazon CloudWatch log group name for egress logs. If a log group name isn't specified, the default name is used: /aws/MediaPackage/EgressAccessLogs.

mediapackage.packaginggroup.logconfigura.Description: Sets a custom Amazon CloudWatch log group name for egress logs. If a log group name isn't specified, the default name is used: /aws/MediaPackage/EgressAccessLogs.
